heading: Service of process
label: 230511 Service of process
text: The corporation shall comply with the law on service of process of each State in which it is incorporated and each State in which it carries on activities.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)23051136:3804., , .May 23, 1986Pub. L. 99–318, § 4100 Stat. 475The words “in furtherance of its corporate purposes” are omitted as unnecessary.
